meaning: adj.不适应的 适应不良的 不利于适应的 显示不适应的
examples: At first glance, the behavior would seem to be maladaptive.
The first step is to identify your maladaptive thought habits.
One of his studies shows how fearing criticism prevents maladaptive perfectionists from improving.
Lincecum Never Once Sought To Assuage His Ego In Maladaptive Ways .
Learning the wrong associations between markers and groups, though, would be maladaptive, so a flexible approach to such markers, discarding them when they prove useless, might be expected.
